description.text:
(Translated from Chinese by AI)
1. Added Java 25 runtime  
2. Upgraded LWJGL to 3.3.6  
3. Fixed the issue where versions after 26.1 snapshot 8 could not run  
4. Added inventory feature switch (swipe up with two fingers on the inventory to open settings)  
5. Removed the Boat backend (due to the upgrade to LWJGL 3.3.6, it cannot coexist with the Pojav backend. If you need to use the Boat backend, you can download the coexistable installation package from GitHub Releases.)  
6. Removed Java 11

（若启动器内下载缓慢请使用网盘下载,64位的请下载arm64，不知道该下哪个的请下载all）
1.添加Java25运行时
2.升级LWJGL到3.3.6
3.修复无法运行26.1 snapshot 8以后到版本的问题
4.增加物品栏功能开关（双指触摸物品栏后向上滑动开启设置）
5.移除Boat后端（由于LWJGL升级为3.3.6，无法与Pojav后端同时存在。如需使用Boat后端，可以在Github Releases内下载共存版安装包。）
6.移除Java11
